name: Clarifai
tagline: Run models and manage AI applications and inputs
description: Invoke Clarifai models and inspect models in an application through the v2 REST API. Use a Personal Access Token for Clarifai-owned or cross-application resources, or an app-specific key for resources confined to that app.

auth.hint: Send Authorization: Key <PAT_OR_APP_KEY>. Store the complete value including the Key prefix if the Arthur authentication configuration does not add it automatically.

tools.name: predict_with_model
tools.description: Send one or more image, text, audio, or video inputs to a model version and return its structured prediction outputs.

params.name: inputs
params.description: One or more Clarifai input objects in the image, text, audio, or video format required by the selected model.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List models in a Clarifai application with details about their latest versions.

params.name: user_id
params.description: Owner of the application; use clarifai for Clarifai-owned public models.

params.name: app_id
params.description: Application identifier; use main for Clarifai's public model application.
